evidence: "It reminds me of all the teen horror movies from the 90's. Love it!"
"Robin brings out a great performance as a Russian musician who defects to the USA. There is drama and comedy in this film."

"You get a great double feature of Robin Williams."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and drama, particularly enjoying the works of Robin Williams. They appreciate high production quality and emotional storytelling, often resonating deeply with the content they consume.
